subcodes.first_line: The Word of God hath appeared from the horizon of the Kingdom of utterance, and the Light of Manifestation hath shone forth from the horizon of Sinai. That Word is the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمه الله از افق ملکوت بیان ظاهر و نور ظهور از افق طور ساطع آنکلمه کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
